metadata.description: Hub region (for hub vNet, Bastion, and jumpbox).
Hub subscription ID. Keep equal to current subscription for v1.
Spoke subscription ID. Keep equal to current subscription for v1.
Jumpbox subscription ID. Keep equal to current subscription for v1.
Gateway subnet CIDR (reserved only in v1).
Azure Firewall subnet CIDR (reserved only in v1).
Private DNS zones to create and link to hub and spoke vNets. Update as needed for your Fabric scenario.
Deploy Azure Bastion in hub vNet.
Deploy jumpbox VM in hub region, in dedicated jumpbox resource group.
Deploy NAT Gateway for outbound internet access from jumpbox subnet.
Deploy workspace-level Fabric private link resources.
NAT Gateway name for jumpbox subnet egress.
Public IP name for jumpbox NAT Gateway.
Name of Microsoft.Fabric/privateLinkServicesForFabric resource for workspace-level private link.
Fabric workspace ID (GUID) for workspace-level private link service.
Name of private endpoint for workspace-level Fabric private link.
Azure region for the resource group.
Azure region for the resource group.
Azure region for the resource group.
Azure region for NAT Gateway resources.
Public IP name used by NAT Gateway.
Azure region for hub network resources.
Reserve GatewaySubnet for future gateway deployment.
Reserve AzureFirewallSubnet for future firewall deployment.
Optional NAT Gateway resource ID to associate to jumpbox subnet for outbound internet access.

properties.subnets: [concat(if(parameters('reserveGatewaySubnet'), createArray(createObject('name', 'GatewaySubnet', 'properties', createObject('addressPrefix', parameters('gatewaySubnetPrefix')))), createArray()), if(parameters('reserveFirewallSubnet'), createArray(createObject('name', 'AzureFirewallSubnet', 'properties', createObject('addressPrefix', parameters('firewallSubnetPrefix')))), createArray()), createArray(createObject('name', 'AzureBastionSubnet', 'properties', createObject('addressPrefix', parameters('bastionSubnetPrefix'))), createObject('name', 'snet-jumpbox', 'properties', union(createObject('addressPrefix', parameters('jumpboxSubnetPrefix')), if(empty(parameters('jumpboxNatGatewayId')), createObject(), createObject('natGateway', createObject('id', parameters('jumpboxNatGatewayId'))))))))]

metadata.description: Azure region for spoke network resources.
Name of the local virtual network in this resource group.
Resource ID of remote virtual network.

peeringId.value: [resourceId('Microsoft.Network/virtualNetworks/virtualNetworkPeerings', split(format('{0}/{1}', parameters('localVnetName'), parameters('peeringName')), '/')[0], split(format('{0}/{1}', parameters('localVnetName'), parameters('peeringName')), '/')[1])]
